split.duplicate_policy: identical content hashes share one split and one bootstrap cluster

preprocessing.logistic_standardization: sklearn StandardScaler fitted with fit-only balanced sample weights
preprocessing.zero_scale: StandardScaler native scale=1 behavior; assert and record

sample_weighting.fit_and_calibration: mean-one weights with equal total mass per active pair x seed x task cell and equal row weight inside each cell
sample_weighting.duplicate_rows: retain original row weights; content groups affect split/bootstrap only

calibration.probability_validation: finite, nonnegative, row sum within 1e-10 of one
calibration.known_warning_policy: allow only the exact FrozenEstimator/sample_weight API warning; fail on every other warning

threshold.action: transfer iff score > threshold; equality chooses receiver
threshold.search: negative infinity, every unique finite calibration score, positive infinity
threshold.objective: pair-balanced task-macro selector accuracy on calibration
threshold.tie_break: larger threshold, therefore lower transfer rate
threshold.serialization: kind plus float.hex for finite thresholds; JSON never stores bare infinity

model_selection.objective: pair-balanced task-macro selector accuracy using calibration-frozen threshold

random_baseline.stratification: pair x task content groups, same action across seeds
random_baseline.rate_match: choose hash-ranked group prefix whose row transfer count is closest to the frozen selector count in the same pair x task stratum
random_baseline.rate_match_tie_break: lower transferred-row count, then shorter prefix
random_baseline.bootstrap: actions frozen; never rerandomize inside bootstrap

metrics.primary: selector accuracy minus calibration-selected global best fixed accuracy, pair-balanced task-macro
metrics.auprc_reporting: balanced-weight pooled AP plus arithmetic macro of pair x seed x task cell AP and prevalence
metrics.multiclass_brier: balanced weighted mean of sum_c (p_c - 1[y=c])^2; range [0,2]
metrics.ece: 15 fixed equal-width bins; balanced weighted classwise one-vs-rest ECE averaged across classes, plus harm and benefit ECE
metrics.harmful_reduction: aggregate numerator and denominator first, then 1 - accepted_harm/all_harm
metrics.beneficial_retention: aggregate numerator and denominator first, then accepted_benefit/all_benefit
metrics.headroom_recovery: (selector - retrospective test best fixed)/(oracle - retrospective test best fixed), untruncated

bootstrap.hierarchy: pairs, seeds within selected pair, synchronous task-stratified content groups retaining all member rows
bootstrap.selection_uncertainty: conditional on frozen candidate, calibration, threshold, and comparator; never refit in bootstrap

sensitivity.leave_one_seed_out: held seed test groups only; fit/calibration/model-selection use other seeds
sensitivity.leave_one_task_out: entire held task is outer test; no held-task outcomes during development
sensitivity.leave_one_pair_out: held pair test groups only; fit/calibration/model-selection use other pairs

runtime.environment_file_drift_note: runtime Python/joblib differ from older environment-file text; formal execution freezes actual imported versions

sealed_test.remote_consumption_policy: evaluate-test atomically creates and pushes this never-reused tag before reading outcomes; an existing tag is terminal
sealed_test.existing_attempt_policy: terminal failure; no overwrite, resume, force, or silent rerun
sealed_test.preconditions: clean main, HEAD equals origin/main and expected selection-lock commit, source/manifests/models/code/runtime hashes verified
